Off Calendar Aug-19-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, Wells Fargo Bank is present. Represented by Norm Hall.
Attorney, Daniel Bornstein, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Lilia Paco, is present.
Attorney, Fiona Cua , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Nils Rosenquest, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 304B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of AUG-23-2010 is vacated.
